title: Resolution Commending and Recognizing Mr. Erwin Q. Bosito of Brgy. San Antonio, Los Baños, Laguna, Member of the Philippines Baseball Team, for Being a Gold Medalist in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games Which Was Held in the Philippines From November 30 to December 10, 2019. (AUTHOR (S) :) Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozyl
